Name: Volkswagen
1Q: How would you translate the name Volkswagen from German?
tip1: One of the most famous slogans in the auto industry is the Volkswagen's Das Auto.
2Q: By what year was manufactured the Type 1 model, better known as first-generation Beetle?
tip2: The final original Type 1 VW Beetle (No. 21,529,464) rolled off the production line at Puebla, Mexico, 65 years after its original launch.
3Q: Which group of people celebrated VW Type 2, a popular van from the 70's?
tip3: Type 2 vans were often painted with extravagant designs in bright colors, making them stand out on the road.
4Q: How much engine volume does Golf 1 GTI have?
tip4: Golf 1 GTI has launched a popular class of hot hatch cars.
5Q: What is the best-selling Volkswagen model?
tip5: VW Golf is often considered a benchmark in its category.
6Q: Which model was the first to be processed by Volkswagen's sport division R GmbH?
tip6: It was the world's first production car with a dual-clutch gearbox - DSG, Direct-Shift Gearbox.
7Q: Which badge get first-generation VW Touareg after the treatment by R GmbH?
tip7: Touareg is the name of a nomadic tribe from the Sahara, and the R50 badge stands for the 5.0-liter V10 diesel engine.
8Q: Which Volkswagen engine won the International Engine of the Year award in its category from 2009 to 2014?
tip8: This engine is used by Scirocco, Ibiza Cupra, Audi A3, Fabia RS and many other models.
9Q: What is the name of the Volkswagen pick-up, introduced in 2010?
tip9: VW Amarok belongs to Volkswagen Commercial Vehicles.
10Q: How Volkswagen call its first modern car family of fully electric vehicles?
tip10: Presentation of the first I.D. concept vehicle was on the 2016 Paris Motor Show.
